props.name: children
props.comment: Fields/components to display in the tab panel.

props.name: contentClassName
props.comment: Additional CSS class applied to the tab panel content wrapper.

props.name: count
props.comment: Optional count badge shown in the trigger, e.g. `count={27}`.

props.name: label
props.comment: Tab label shown in the trigger.

props.name: path
props.comment: Custom URL segment for this tab (syncWithLocation only).
